payload.answer: The new fact appears to supersede the existing employment fact: Sam no longer works at Goldman and has joined Point72.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to Sam in an employment transition context; they appear to describe the same person.

evidence.new_fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
evidence.reason: The new fact indicates a job change, so the prior employment-at-Goldman fact is no longer current.
